_comment: SINGLE-PAGE LANDER. Everything a client edits lives here. build.js is never touched. The `focus` field documents which copy angle this lander uses; the orchestrator seeds copy from it. Swap the bracketed/placeholder values per client.

meta.description: Tried physical therapy before and it didn't work? Our expert sports PTs in Charleston help active adults get back to what they love — pain-free. Claim your $97 eval.

offer.headline: $97 Comprehensive Evaluation
offer.detail: A 90-minute one-on-one assessment with a Doctor of Physical Therapy — normally $250.

index.title: Made 2 Move Physical Therapy — PT That Actually Works | Charleston, SC
index.description: Tried PT before and it didn't work? Our expert sports PTs in Charleston help active adults get back to what they love — pain-free. Claim your $97 eval.

blocks.eyebrow: Charleston, SC · For active adults who've tried PT before
blocks.headline: Let our team of expert sports PTs show you that PT WORKS
blocks.subhead: Get back to doing what you love — pain-free. If physical therapy let you down before, it's because it wasn't built for an active body like yours.

blocks.headline: Tried PT before and nothing really changed?
blocks.body: You're not broken, and you're not out of options. If any of this sounds familiar, you're exactly who we built this for:
items: The pain came back the moment you got active again
You got a sheet of generic exercises and a hot pack
Nobody ever found the real reason you were hurting
You're starting to believe you just have to live with it

blocks.headline: If any of that sounds like you, we can help.
blocks.body: There's a reason it didn't work last time — and a clear path to fixing it.

blocks.headline: Don't take our word for it

items.name: Van K.
items.quote: Without Made 2 Move, I would have completely given up on running. They found what three other clinics missed.

items.name: Addisen S.
items.quote: I was in enough hip pain that a run was no fun at all. So glad I made the call — I'm back to training pain-free.

items.name: Ashley R.
items.quote: After years of being told to just rest, they actually fixed the root cause. I wish I'd come here first.

blocks.headline: Don't let an old injury derail your goals

items.title: Afraid of making it worse
items.body: You've stopped doing what you love because every flare-up feels like a setback you can't afford.

items.title: Pain that keeps coming back
items.body: Rest helps for a week, then it returns the moment you get active again. The cycle never ends.

items.title: Losing ground every month
items.body: The longer it drags on, the more strength, fitness, and confidence you give up. Waiting costs you.

blocks.headline: Why Made 2 Move is different
blocks.intro: We don't do hot packs and band-aids. We find why the last attempt failed and build a plan around the active life you actually want.

items.title: Full movement assessment
items.body: A 90-minute, head-to-toe evaluation that finds the real driver of your pain — not just where it hurts.

items.title: A plan built for your body
items.body: One-on-one care and a custom plan built around your sport, your goals, and your schedule.

items.title: So it doesn't come back
items.body: We rebuild the strength and mechanics that keep the pain gone for good — not just until next week.

blocks.headline: Ready to find out why it didn't work last time?
blocks.body: Your $97 eval includes a full 90-minute one-on-one assessment with a Doctor of Physical Therapy.

steps.title: Claim your $97 evaluation
steps.body: Book your 90-minute assessment online in under a minute. No referral needed.

steps.title: Get a real diagnosis & plan
steps.body: We find the root cause everyone else missed and map out exactly how we'll fix it.

steps.title: Get back to doing what you love
steps.body: Execute the plan with a coach in your corner and return stronger — without fear of re-injury.

blocks.headline: Charleston patients who got their lives back
blocks._reviews_modes: THREE WAYS TO FILL THIS: (1) leave items[] as curated cards below + set googleUrl to link out to the Google profile [default/hybrid]; (2) if the client already pays for a reviews widget, set "widgetHtml" to their embed code and it renders the live widget instead of the cards; (3) no reviews at all -> remove items, googleUrl, widgetHtml and the section disappears.
blocks.googleCta: Read all our reviews on Google ★

items.name: Rachel H.
items.quote: Broke my foot and thought running was over. Twelve weeks later I ran 3 miles pain-free. The team here is incredible.

items.name: Jordan P.
items.quote: Knee pain I'd had for two years, gone. They adjusted the plan every week based on how I responded. Worth every penny.

items.name: Marcus T.
items.quote: Other places treated the symptom. Made 2 Move found the actual problem in my hip and finally fixed it.

items.name: Dana L.
items.quote: Personalized, professional, and they actually listen. I went from barely walking to back in the gym.

blocks.headline: Your comeback starts with one call.
blocks.body: Spots for the $97 evaluation are limited each week. Claim yours before they're gone.

blocks.headline: Claim your $97 evaluation
blocks.intro: Fill out the form and we'll be in touch to lock in your 90-minute assessment. Every CTA on this page scrolls here.
